headline: ICE and Ornn to launch GPU compute futures contracts
summary: Intercontinental Exchange and Ornn plan to launch cash-settled GPU compute futures based on Ornn's Compute Price Index, joining a growing field of exchanges targeting AI infrastructure derivatives.

headline: 48. Polymarket
summary: Polymarket, which is a leader in the exploding prediction markets industry alongside rival Kalshi, ranks No. 48 on CNBC’s 2026 Disruptor 50 list.
